final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing panoramic illustration of the Tang Dynasty Chang'an Lantern Festival.

Style/medium: must be gongbi heavy-color (工笔重彩) long scroll aesthetic
Composition: needs a sweeping panoramic cityscape view — exact framing and focal points are yours
Subject: must include tens of thousands of lanterns illuminating the night sky, the lantern festival atmosphere
Scene/backdrop: must include Tang Dynasty Chang'an cityscape, night sky filled with lanterns
Lighting/mood: needs a festive night atmosphere with warm lantern glow — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a rich, saturated heavy-color direction — exact pigment choices and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs traditional Chinese painting surface treatment — exact brushwork and paper texture are yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
